name: Pocket Practice
mission: Help people build a daily learning habit with short mobile lessons.
namespace: pocket-practice
lifecycle: active
owners:
  - product-owner
runtime_adapters:
  - adapter.flutter
workflow_adapters:
  - adapter.figma
success_criteria:
  - A learner can complete and track one short lesson each day.
included_scope:
  - A consumer mobile application for short daily lessons
excluded_scope:
  - Production deployment
